title: Send PaymentAction::Confirmed on receipt
description:
What: Replace the auto-confirm stub in the payee dispatch_payment branch with real logic: receive ConfirmationEvent from watcher channel and send PaymentAction::Confirmed to the payer.

Algorithm:
1. Remove the stub at cli/src/commands.rs ~line 1823: 'auto-confirming since chain watcher not yet implemented'.
2. In the select! branch for conf_rx.recv() (added by nie-hov.2):
   a. Call wallet_store.transition_session(ev.session_id, PaymentState::Complete).
   b. Look up the payer pub_id from the session (session.peer_pub_id).
   c. Call send_payment_message(ev.session_id, PaymentAction::Confirmed { tx_hash: ev.txid }, tx, mls_active, mls).await.
   d. Log at info: 'Payment confirmed: session={} txid={}', ev.session_id, ev.txid.
3. Also update payer side (~line 1872): when PaymentAction::Confirmed is received, verify tx_hash is 64 lowercase hex chars before accepting; log receipt.

Defensive programming:
- tx_hash must be exactly 64 lowercase hex chars; assert/validate before sending.
- If send_payment_message fails (peer disconnected), log warn and continue — do not panic.
- Do not resend Confirmed if session already in Complete state (idempotency guard).
- Never log tx_hash alongside wallet key material.

Tests:
- test_confirmed_message_format: given ConfirmationEvent with known txid, assert PaymentAction::Confirmed { tx_hash } serializes to expected JSON with action='confirmed' and tx_hash=64 hex chars. Oracle: serde_json output of manually constructed PaymentAction::Confirmed.
- test_txhash_validation: tx_hash with 63 chars or uppercase rejected.

Acceptance: cargo test passes; stub removed; PaymentAction::Confirmed tx_hash validated; clippy clean.
notes: REQUIRED: After sending PaymentAction::Confirmed and transitioning session to Complete, call watch_registry.deregister(&session.address) to remove the completed session from the in-memory watch registry. This is the only cleanup path — see nie-o6zv.2 for rationale.
close_reason: Implemented: conf_rx.recv() handler in chat loop transitions payee session to Confirmed and sends PaymentAction::Confirmed to payer. Auto-confirm stub removed. Payer-side tx_hash validation (64 lowercase hex). Address deregistered from watch_registry on confirm. 2 new acceptance tests.
